name: google-calendar
description: Anthropic MCP reference server for Google Calendar. Used by the scheduler skill. Implemented by @modelcontextprotocol/server-google-calendar.

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create a calendar event with attendees and notes.

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List events in a time window (ISO-8601 in/out).

tools.name: update_event
tools.description: Update an existing event (time, title, attendees).
